data.name: Lust Fantasy 💜
data.detailed_description:
Open up the world of magic and adventure in Lust Fantasy 💜 - as a result of a magical ritual, the protagonist is transported from his everyday boring modern world to a mysterious village. To return home, he must uncover the secrets of an ancient shrine and establish relationships with a variety of local fantasy characters.

In this charming world, individuals who possess magic powers have only one way to recover their magical energy - through sex! After a few attempts to get you back, a local sorcerer's apprentice happens to mention the prophecy, and you face an important choice.

Would you leave with Lorelei to go on an adventure looking for a way to get you back, or stay in the village with its leader, Lysandra, who’s accused of using dark magic? Who can you trust and what choice will lead you home? Who’s trying to help, and who just wants to use you for their own purposes? Play and find out!

Get familiar with this new enigmatic world, meet various characters, build your relationships with them, complete quests and make important choices - your fate depends on you, so don’t hesitate and go for it!

Features:

  • Hot adult action - sorceresses and magicians, bartenders and druids, orcs and elves await!
  • Delightful 3D graphics - high detailization and beautiful rendering to enhance the immersiveness.
  • Intriguing story - try to get back from the magical world while making new friends on the way!
  • Choices matter - the game offers different routes to explore and different endings to them.
  • Diverse characters - each one with different personalities, appearance and motives.
  • Gameplay flow that’s easy to follow - one hand’s enough ( ͡~ ͜ʖ ͡°)

data.short_description: Jump into the world full of elves, orcs, unbelievable situations and hot 18+ action in Lust Fantasy 💜 - an adult isekai visual novel about a regular guy who accidentally gets teleported into a medieval world full of magic and mysteries! Would you find the way back?..
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Vietnamese, Greek, Danish, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Norwegian, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Romanian, Thai, Turkish, Hungarian, Ukrainian, Finnish, Czech, Swedish, Japanese, Indonesian, Spanish - Latin America

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 or above
  • Processor: Intel or AMD
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Direct X compatible
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
